title: RF elements Twin Horn Bracket
description: Twin Horn Bracket allows you to install two symmetrical Horn antennas with exactly the same alignment. The bracket also accommodates mainstream 4x4 radios, such as ePMPâ¢ 3000 or Mimosa® A5c. High density sectors or 4x4 deployments are now ingeniously simple Twin Horn Bracket also provides integrated mounting option for 4x4 radios available on the market, such as CambiumTM ePMPTM 3000 and Mimosa® A5c. The radio and antennas are integrated on the same structure, enabling easy installation in the field. Radio mount is detachable, so the THB can be used with any 3rd party radio that is mounted separately Twin Horn Bracket features a new innovative mounting system. The mount is separated from the antenna which makes the antenna installation and adjustment easy and quick Twin horn bracket Pole mounting bracket Hex key 5mm
